     the Fermi energy is    -0.6633 ev

!    total energy              =   -6614.54981826 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          2.3E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26642359 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -6614.28339467 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -137550.96405941 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   69429.40594989 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2721.61981117 Ry
